body: My roommate labels every single item in the fridge with her name and a date. I ate one unlabeled yogurt and she filed a 'formal roommate complaint' in our group chat. I ate it. Am I the villain?

My boyfriend of two years still hasn't added me on Instagram 'to keep his page professional.' He's a marketing major. I found out we're not connected on anything. I went through his tagged photos to check.
My parents are paying my younger brother's full tuition but made me take loans 'to build character.' I skipped Thanksgiving and told them I was building character at Waffle House instead.
I Venmo-requested my friend $4 for the guac I added to our shared Chipotle order. She said it was 'giving broke energy.' I added a note that said 'so is not paying me back.'
My best friend asked me to be a bridesmaid, then sent a $900 dress link and a 'mandatory' Cabo bachelorette. I said I could only do one. She said I was 'ruining the vibe.'
A coworker keeps microwaving fish in the tiny lab break room. I anonymously taped a printed 'no seafood' sign to the microwave. He figured out it was me from the font.
My suitemate started charging her boyfriend 'guest rent' of $50/month for staying over — then asked ME to split it since he uses our bathroom. I laughed out loud in her face.
He said 'we're basically dating' for four months but wouldn't call me his girlfriend. So when someone asked at a party, I said we were 'basically strangers.' He got upset.
